texto: I write books that I want to read. I write books that feature curvy heroines because I'm a curvy woman myself and it gets tiresome to read books about skinny women all the time. There's nothing wrong with skinny women, I just don't relate to their lives, and it would be really hard for me, as a writer, to fully inhabit that character otherwise.
explicacao: Citação de Seraphina Donavan sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I write books that I want to read. I write books that feature curvy heroines because I'm a curvy …” articula tempo, bbw, contemporary-romance em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como contemporary-romance e curvy-heroines.

frase_original: I write books that I want to read. I write books that feature curvy heroines because I'm a curvy woman myself and it gets tiresome to read books about skinny women all the time. There's nothing wrong with skinny women, I just don't relate to their lives, and it would be really hard for me, as a writer, to fully inhabit that character otherwise.
